problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
